title: Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Dark Trooper campaign)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Otheruses|Mission to Nar Shaddaa}} {{Mission |prev=[[Mission to Anteevy]]''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' |conc= |next=[[Mission to Coruscant (Kyle Katarn)|Mission to Coruscant]] |image=[[File:Mission_to_Nar_Shaddaa.png]] |name=Mission to Nar Shaddaa
(Dark Trooper campaign) |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] ([[Dark Trooper Project]]) |objective=*Initial: Find [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] navigational evidence *Later: Escape the [[Star Jewel/Legends|''Star Jewel'']] |date=[[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}} places the outbreak of the [[Candorian plague/Legends|Candorian plague]] on [[Dentaal]] on 36:2:12, which falls in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. {{FactFile|130|MAD 1-4|General Crix Madine}} tie together the events of ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' and [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']], and Madine's own recollections in [[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] as follows: upon learning of the [[Dark Trooper Project]], Madine alerts the Rebel Alliance to the project's existence, thus starting the events of ''Dark Forces''. Shortly afterwards, Madine is ordered to release the Candorian plague on Dentaal, an event which is dated to 36:2:12 per the Adventure Journal. Madine vanishes into the wilderness shortly afterwards, spending a week in the jungles of Dentaal before escaping and fleeing the planet—only to be captured almost immediately by General [[Rom Mohc]] and imprisoned on [[Orinackra]]. Kyle Katarn then frees Madine from Orinackra, and Madine is then involved in the [[Battle of Corellia (1 ABY)|battle]] at [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' states that only a short amount of time passed between Madine telling the Alliance about the Dark Troopers and his defection. The length of time Madine spends on the run places his capture and imprisonment on Orinackra firmly in the month 36:3, or the first month of [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. Therefore, the events of ''Dark Forces'' prior to the [[mission to Orinackra]] fall in 0 ABY, and the remainder of the game, including the mission to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], occur in 1 ABY. |place=*[[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] *Aboard the [[Star Jewel/Legends|''Star Jewel'']] |result=[[Kyle Katarn]] recovers an Imperial [[nava card]] off of Nar Shaddaa, and after being captured by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], Katarn escapes Jabba's ship after re-retrieving the nava card and rescuing [[Jan Ors]]. |side1=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |side2=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's criminal empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=Jan Ors |commanders2=Jabba the Hutt {{C|via [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]]}} |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=Kyle Katarn |ppl2=*1 [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] *5 [[Imperial commando/Legends|Imperial commandos]] *10 [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] *6 [[Marksman-H combat remote|Training remotes]] *23 [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] mercenaries *59 [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guards *77 [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] thugs *5 [[Kell dragon/Legends|Kell dragons]] |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=None |casual2=All encountered resistance |casual3= |casual4= |civilian=None }} {{Quote|Ah, the big city. Too bad there's not time to catch some night life. At least I'll blend in.|Kyle Katarn|''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''}} During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] continued a [[Dark Trooper Project|crusade]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] efforts in creating [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] called [[Dark Trooper/Legends|Dark troopers]]. During the [[Standard year/Legends|standard year]] [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the Alliance's two head operatives for the campaign, [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]], embarked on a '''mission to the moon Nar Shaddaa''' to track a down a [[nava card]] that would hopefully reveal the location of the factory [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Arc Hammer]]'', which was producing the Dark troopers. After Ors dropped Katarn off at a landing point, Katarn fought his way through Imperial troops and various [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] who were out to kill him. Katarn eventually located the nava card and was retrieved by Ors in their ship, the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]''. However, as they left [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], they were captured by the [[Star Jewel/Legends|''Star Jewel'']], the personal [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] of the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. Ors was imprisoned and Katarn was set to be executed, as their various missions against the Empire had threatened Jabba's stake in the Imperial project. However, Katarn defeated Jabba's [[Kell dragon/Legends|kell dragon]] with his [[Unarmed combat/Legends|bare hands]], retrieved the nava card, rescued Ors, and escaped the ''Star Jewel'' with the ''Moldy Crow''. ==Prelude== {{Quote|The smugglers must be getting their routes from the Empire somehow, and this is the hub for just that kind of activity.|Jan Ors briefs Kyle Katarn on the mission|}} During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] devised a new weapon to combat their enemy, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Referred to as [[Dark Trooper/Legends|Dark troopers]], they were [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] equipped with state-of-the-art weaponry. The brain child of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Rom Mohc]], the Dark troopers were built on the [[Factory/Legends|factory]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Arc Hammer]]''. To combat the [[Dark Trooper Project]], the Alliance dispatched two agents, [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]], to disrupt and ultimately end the project once and for all. After [[Mission to Anteevy|destroying]] a [[Ice Station Beta/Legends|robotics facility]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Anteevy/Legends|Anteevy]] during the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Ors learned, by tracking [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] ships that had visited Anteevy to drop off supplies for the Empire, that all roads for the smuggler activity led to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. With the ship ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'', Ors and Katarn embarked to what was often called the "Smuggler's Moon" to further disrupt the smugglers' efforts in aiding the Empire and steal a [[nava card]] that could potentially lead to the ''Arc Hammer''{{'s}} location. However, Mohc placed a bounty on Katarn's head, which made him a valuable target for Nar Shaddaa's resident [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. ==The mission to Nar Shaddaa== ===Shootouts in the Vertical City=== {{Quote|Everyone's an alien in this place, and everyone's got something to hide. Me, I've got something to find.|Kyle Katarn|}} Ors dropped Katarn off near a moving platform before flying off to wait for Katarn's completion of the main objective: stealing the nava card. Alongside a strong Imperial presence, the path to the Imperial facility was littered with various bounty hunters and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] working for an as of yet unknown [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]. {{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Dark Forces}} As Katarn began his trek through the [[City/Legends|city]] streets, he was quickly attacked by a lone [[Remote/Legends|remote]] droid, which Katarn dispatched. The attack was followed by an encounter with several [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] with [[Axe/Legends|axes]]. Katarn fought his way through the aliens, [[Death/Legends|killing]] those he encountered. Katarn also dueled [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] throwing [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] and [[Concussion rifle/Legends|concussion rifle]] toting [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]]. Using a [[Jeron fusion cutter]] for most of the enemy encounters, Katarn eventually recovered a [[Stouker concussion rifle]] from a fallen Trandoshan and used in conjunction with the [[Fusioncutter/Legends|fusioncutter]] and an [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]]. The Rebel agent also used thermal detonators of his own to disable enemy-planted [[I.M. mine|claymores]]. [[File:Ncard.png|thumb|left|The Imperial nava card]] After prolonged battling, Katarn eventually reached an Imperial facility protected by various Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], [[Imperial commando/Legends|commandos]], and [[Imperial officer/Legends|officers]]. After [[Lightfight|blasting]] his way through the Imperials and further mercenaries, Katarn came across a blue-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Keycard/Legends|keycard]]. Katarn searched for the door that it corresponded too and opened it. Eventually, Katarn fought his way through a narrow catwalk guarded by detonator tossing Gran. Katarn survived their attacks, killed the Gran, and successfully made it across and found a small Imperial control room. The room contained the sought-after nava card, guarded by stormtroopers, and commandos. Katarn killed all three Imperials and snatched the card. With the nava card firmly in his possession, Katarn was picked up by Ors. {{Endgame}} ===Captured by Jabba the Hutt=== {{Quote|Jabba the Hutt, the Fat One, the Slimy One, returns. This is not good. He's taken my gear, all my weapons, the nava card—and Jan. I've got to find her after I battle some Kell dragons.|Katarn muses the turn of events|}} [[File:KyleThrownIntoPit-DFRemaster.png|thumb|right|250px|Katarn is thrown into the Kell dragon pit]] As the Rebel pair lifted from Nar Shaddaa, the ''Moldy Crow'' was near-immediately snared in the [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]] of the luxury [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] [[Star Jewel/Legends|''Star Jewel'']], the personal craft of the crime lord [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. As it turned out, it was Jabba's smugglers that had been helping the Empire make the necessary trips to deliver the materials that the Dark Trooper Project needed across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Ors was imprisoned in the ship's brig, and Katarn was stripped of his gear which consisted of his personal [[Bryar pistol/Legends|Bryar pistol]] and all of the other weapons he had collected in missions past, and brought to the lair of [[Jabba's favorite kell dragon]], to which Katarn was to be fed too. After being escorted to the pit by [[Unidentified Gamorrean (Star Jewel)|two]] [[Unidentified Gamorrean 2 (Star Jewel)|Gamorrean]] [[Security guard/Legends|guards]], Jabba contacted his prisoner via a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]], as Jabba was not actually present on his ship. The Hutt taunted Katarn, noting that his only regret was that he would be unable to personally see Katarn die. Katarn tried to threaten Jabba under the impression that Ors had been hurt, but was subsequently thrown into the [[Kell dragon/Legends|Kell dragon]] pit by the guards. {{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Dark Forces}} Despite having no weapons, Katarn killed Jabba's Kell dragon with his [[Unarmed combat/Legends|bare hands]], along with several other Kell dragons. In response to this, a large door in the pit opened, revealing more Kell dragons and another door that led deeper into the ship. Katarn bested the kell dragons and two Gran, liberated the area of [[Personal energy shield/Legends|personal energy shields]] and the Grans' dropped detonators, and, after stealing a blue [[Keycard/Legends|Keycard]], moved further into the ship. Katarn's first order of business was to retrieve his confiscated gear. Katarn found and recovered it after killing the Gamorreans guarding it. Now fully equipped, Katarn blasted his way through the remainder of Jabba's troops and Kell dragons using the weapons he had prioritized on Nar Shaddaa. After abducting a yellow keycard from a [[Dianoga/Legends|dianoga]]-inhabited waste pit, Katarn passed a cell corridor into a restaurant of circular rooms, where he was able to locate the confiscated nava card. Finally, Katarn set out to rescue his partner. The removal of the card opened a mechanical door and, after battling through more guards and kell dragons, Katarn finally located the brig and killed the Trandoshan, Gran, and Gamorrean defenders. Katarn found Ors' cell and freed her, and together they escaped the ''Star Jewel'' aboard the ''Moldy Crow'', depriving Jabba of his revenge against Katarn. {{Endgame}} ==Aftermath== {{Quote|That's another one I owe you, Kyle.|Ors after her rescue|}} With the nava card in hand, Ors and Katarn [[Mission to Coruscant (Kyle Katarn)|traveled]] to the Imperial [[Capital/Legends|capital]] planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] so that they could infiltrate the [[Imperial Security Operations]] building and decode the nava card. After decoding the card, the Rebel duo were one step closer to defeating Mohc and the Dark Trooper Project for good. Eventually, Ors and Katarn effectively ended the Imperial endeavor with the [[Mission to the Arc Hammer|destruction]] of the ''Arc Hammer''. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|What's the proper way to punch a Kell dragon or two? First, punch them head on, right in the nose.|Jeff Hoff gives players advice on how to deal with Kell dragons|}} [[File:Narshadmis.png|thumb|right|250px|Gameplay of "The Death Mark"]] Kyle Katarn's mission to Nar Shaddaa first appeared in the [[1995]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'', where it comprised of the ninth and tenth levels of the game. More information regarding the mission as well as a suggested path of completion were provided in the ''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]'', which was written by [[Jeff Hoff]]. This article is written under the assumption that 100% game completion involves following the guide's instructions and suggestions, such as what weapons to use in what situations, while playing on the game's "Hard" difficulty setting. The game's briefing screens referred to the level on Nar Shaddaa as "Nar Shaddaa, the Vertical City: The Death Mark," and named the escape from Jabba's ship "Jabba the Hutt's ship: Jabba's Revenge." ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces Remaster]]'' ==Sources== *''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{NightdiveYouTube|4b9TTurkH4c|Star Wars™: Dark Forces Remaster - Reveal Trailer}} *{{InsiderCite|222|Launchpad}} {{Po}} *{{NightdiveYouTube|3ndr_cPvwvo|Star Wars™: Dark Forces Remaster - Available Now!}} *{{SW|url=news/dark-forces-remaster|text=''Dark Forces'' ''Remaster'' Comes to Consoles and PC}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Dark Trooper}} {{Interlang |es=Misión a Nar Shaddaa (Campaña Soldado Oscuro) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nar Shaddaa (Dark Trooper campaign), mission to}} [[Category:Battles of the Dark Trooper Project]] [[Category:Missions to Nar Shaddaa]]
